column1: # Producer-sourced golden for the locked-world (scene/tiles/v1 `locked: true`)
#   tile-CENTER positions — NOT snapped to the nearest climate cell — matching
#   meridian) across every latitude row — node indices 32
# These are the sim's ground-truth temperatures (full precision); the orrery's
# TS evaluator reconstructs the locked seasonal term from the librating
# substellar point at the SAME tile-center position and must agree to ~1e-6

column2: NEVER a client reconstruction of itself (The Isotherm rule).
